feat.name: Toppling Transformation
feat.text: You use your body's expansion as leverage to displace a nearby creature. You attempt to Shove or Trip an adjacent creature. For the purposes of determining what size creature you can affect, use your final size after the triggering effect.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

feat.trigger: Your size increases due to a polymorph effect.
